daily_summary.headline: Aurora and Rocket Launches Dominate the Day

top_events.title: G2 Geomagnetic Storm
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering a good chance to view auroras down to 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check for aurora visibility if you're in a high-latitude area.

top_events.title: Soyuz 2.1a Launch
top_events.description: Soyuz 2.1a is launching the Progress MS-33 resupply mission to the ISS.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream of the launch.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX will launch a batch of Starlink satellites, continuing its mega-constellation expansion.
top_events.action: Tune in to the live stream for the launch.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
